answer: The November Markdown frontmatter canary traced a quadrant ballast drift ratio issue to stale atlas lane metadata. The correct source was fm_src_kilo_73, the incorrect source was prose_scan_delta_12, and the affected pipeline/asset were pipe_ozone_41q and asset.vellum_quartz_908. Remediation is to promote extractor gate rhea-44 before cobalt merge under team-rivet-echo.

facts.remediation: promote extractor gate rhea-44 before cobalt merge
facts.root_cause: atlas lane emitted stale cobalt token
